description: Search your Pantheon contacts, read cross-channel message timelines, and query the AI brain.
name: run.pantheon/mcp

headers.description: Optional. Omit to connect via browser sign-in — the server advertises its OAuth authorization server, so a spec-compliant client registers itself and completes the consent flow with no pasted key. Supply `Bearer pk_live_<key>` (a Pantheon developer API key with the `mcp` scope, created under Settings → Developer) only for the full tool surface, which adds `ai_query`.
headers.name: Authorization
